name: Spinach Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Very finely chopped cooked spinach, well drained
1 teaspoon Olive oil or cooking oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together 2-1/4 cups of the flour and salt.
2. Make a well in the center. Combine eggs, spinach, water, and olive oil; add to flour. Mix well.
3. Sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup flour on the kneading surface. Turn the dough out onto the floured surface.
4. Knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic (8 to 10 minutes).
5. Divide the dough into thirds or fourths. On a lightly floured surface, roll each portion into a 16 x 12 inch rectangle or a 12 inch square.
6. If using a pasta machine, pass the dough through the machine until it is 1/16 inch thick. Dust with additional flour as needed to prevent sticking.
7. Makes 1-1/4 pounds.
